global_vibe: Premium agri-enterprise, trustworthy, grounded, functional yet editorial.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Dense data alignment.
layout_spacing.sidebar: Collapsible left sidebar for navigation, saving horizontal space for complex tables.
layout_spacing.borders_and_shadows: Flat surfaces with 1px crisp borders. Avoid heavy shadows. Use soft, diffuse shadow-sm for active elements.

component_guidelines.tables: Use Shadcn tables. Left-align data. Add generous p-4 to cells. Sticky header for scrollability.
component_guidelines.cards: Cardless look where possible or flat rectangular cards with 1px border. No excessive border-radius (max rounded-lg).
component_guidelines.buttons: Primary buttons: Dark Green (#1A3C2B). Action/Accent buttons: Gold (#D4A853). Ensure 3:1 contrast minimum.
component_guidelines.forms: Shadcn inputs. Left-aligned labels. Generous spacing between groups.
component_guidelines.alerts: Overdue Credit Alert Banner should use a muted terracotta/error tone, sticky at the top of the dashboard.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-px and slight darkening of border/background. ALWAYS explicitly set hover text colors.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-colors duration-200, or transition-transform for scaling.
interactions_and_motion.drawers: Use slide-over drawers (Shadcn Sheet) for Farmer Detail and Add Product forms to preserve context without navigating away.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='farmer-filter-input', data-testid='add-product-modal-trigger'.

login_hero_background.description: Dense field of vibrant green grass for login split screen
login_hero_background.usage: Background image for the non-form half of the login screen. Requires a gradient overlay (bg-black/30) if text is placed on top.

map_texture.usage: Can be used as a subtle background pattern for AI chat empty states or Settings page headers

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all dashboard icons.
Use 'recharts' for Analytics (Line/Bar/Donut) as they look great with custom themes.
Use 'react-leaflet' for the map view on the geographic activity section.
Prioritize 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for the primary UI. Only use 'DM Serif Display' for large titles, the login screen, or major section headers.
The overdue credit alert must be highly visible but elegant (use the terracotta error color subtly with strong typography).
Keep standard pages cardless. Just pure grids and subtle outlines.
Ensure all theme toggles properly invert the specific color palette outlined in these guidelines.
